sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77849" key="paragkali/zomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραγκᾰλ-ίζομαι</orth>, <sense id="n77849.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">take into one's arms</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:139" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.139</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
